sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104686" key="tresa=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρεσᾶς</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρέσας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n104686.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τρέω</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg004.perseus-grc1:1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
